titleStmt.title: SII 37.30: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 30. (A.R. No. 385 of 1938-39.) Gōṭūru, Cuddapah Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Wall of the Bhairavēśvara temple in Survey No. 274.
This is dated in Śaka 1342, Plava, Vaiśākha, ba. 30, Thursday corresponding to 1421 A.D., May 1.

Incomplete. It records the gift of both dry and wet lands (veli-senu and vari-maḍi) situated in different localities by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Ōbaḷayyadēva Chōḷa mahārāju to god Bhairavadēva at Gōṭūru for the merit of his parents mahāmaṇḍalēśvara apratīkamalla Gaṇapatidēva-chōḍa-mahārāju and Āubhaḷamma. Further it records the renewal by prajas headed by Akkam Bairapa Reḍḍi and Mutyāla Bairapa Reḍḍi of the previous grant of lands made to the same god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrī śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1342 Agunēṭi plava saṁvatsara vayiśākha ba 30
gu . svasti . śrī manmahāmaṁḍēśvara Apratikamalla gaṇapatidēvacōḍa mahārarā
jula kumāruḍu Obaḷayyadēvacōḍa mahārājulu tama taṁḍri gaṇapati
rājukuṁnnu tamatalli Avubhaḷaṁmmakuṁnnu puṇyamugānu gōṭūribeyiravadēvaraku yī
dināna peṭina velisenu kolapāṭi 31 . varimaḍi Eṟaguḍikālvanu 31 . pū¨rvvāna yidēva
raku jellevarisēnu Enamaṁdumunnu yirusānu varimaḍi reḍikālvanu yiddumunnu yirusānu Eragu
ḍikālvanu padumuṁnnuyirusānu Uttama gaṁḍakālvanu maḍinaltumunnu yirusānu ceṟuvukriṁdanu
maḍilu Idumuṁnnu marrikālvalu ceruvu kriṁdanu maḍimalki padēdumunnu Irusa maḍinnivelisēnupa
ṁdumunnu gōṭūri Akkaṁbayirapareḍinni mutyala bayirvareḍi sayitamayina samasta prajaluṁnnu
dhammaśāsanamugāvēyiṁciyistimigāna yīdha¨rmmānaku Evvaru kalla sēsinānu paṁcca mahāpātakāna bōduru . gaṁgākaṟata
boḍcina pāpāna bōduru .
Digital edition of SII 37.30 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
